description: Event Participation Gate parameters — derived from Phase R research
k_rationale: 100% crossing rate, median 30.3s — early enough to precede scanner trigger at 30% momentum. k=3 fires too early (11.6s), k=10+ too late (53-74s).
half_life_rationale: 5-minute half-life. tau=120s too aggressive (6% pass frac at p=0.65), tau=600s too permissive (18%). tau=300s gives 11% pass fraction — selective but usable.
peak_threshold_rationale: First fail at median 1001s (17 min) — provides a meaningful participation window. p=0.80 too tight (669s), p=0.50 too loose (1384s).
warmup_rationale: 5 minutes after T_event — gate inactive during initial price discovery.
premarket_rationale: Pre-market median first fail (1021s) similar to regular (829s) at tau=300s p=0.65. No separate parameterization needed.
r3_escalation_note: Pooled lambda_V vs |delta_mid| correlation = 0.0117 (below 0.3 threshold). Per-event median = 0.3189. Gate is a reasonable activity filter but weak price movement predictor.
